name: Apricot Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red Bell Pepper, Roasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a red bell pepper in half, remove seeds, and roast one half (brush with olive oil and place under the broiler very close to the heat until blackened, about 5 minutes). Chop.
2. Sauté onion in about a tablespoon of olive oil until translucent. Add tomato and jalapeno and cook another 5 minutes, until tomato is cooked.
3. Add apple cider vinegar to cover and apricots, then bring to a boil until the vinegar is almost completely evaporated.
4. Stir in the chopped roasted bell pepper.
5. Add dark rum and flambe (light and swirl until it goes out).
